commands.name: e2e-runtime
commands.run: CI=1 npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js tests/e2e/specs/runtime --reporter=list --retries=0 --workers=1

commands.name: e2e-smoke
commands.run: CI=1 npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js tests/e2e/specs/smoke --reporter=list --retries=0 --workers=1
